M1033_HOSP_RISK_OTHR M1033 (M1032) Risk For Hospitalization - Other This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization is other risk not listed here. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1033_HOSP_RISK_NONE_ABOVE M1033 (M1032) Risk For Hosp - None Of The Above This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization is none of the above. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes)
